tasks.label: Build after pass-through errors and mapping fix
Bust price cache and pin ASINs
Commit pricing fix
args:
cd 'c:\Users\hanri\OneDrive\Documents\GitHub\gptlisting-ebay-webhooks' ; git add -A ; git commit -m 'fix: read product.buybox.price.value for ASIN lookups (SearchAPI schema fix)

SearchAPI amazon_product engine stores the buybox price as a nested object:
  product.buybox.price.value = 89  (not product.price or product.buybox_price)

Previous code checked product.buybox_price (flat number) which does not exist
in this engine, causing lookupAmazonByAsin() to always return no-price and
fall through to the unreliable brand keyword search.

Fix in amazon-search.ts lookupAmazonByAsin():
  1. product.buybox?.price?.value      (SearchAPI — current Add-to-Cart price)
  2. product.buybox?.original_price?.value  (SearchAPI — original/list price)
  3. product.buybox_price              (flat number, other engines)
  4. product.price                     (last fallback)

Also:
- Pinned ASIN B0G442H9RZ (ki Vinoreset Mist $42.99) to brand registry
- bust-price-cache.ts updated with ki Vinoreset Mist pin
- Added test-pricing-live.ts and test-asin-raw.ts scripts

Verified locally:
  Root ReLive Greens  -> $89    PASS (expected $75-$100)
  ki Vinoreset Mist   -> $42.99 PASS (expected $35-$55)' ; git push

tasks.label: Git commit and push pricing fix
args: cd 'c:\Users\hanri\OneDrive\Documents\GitHub\gptlisting-ebay-webhooks' ; git add -A ; git commit -m 'fix: read product.buybox.price.value for ASIN lookups + pin ki/Vinoreset and verify both prices locally' ; git push
